description: You are a corporate IT administrator deploying a welcome video to a lobby display monitor using VLC. Create an executable bash script at /home/ga/Desktop/launch_signage.sh that launches VLC to play /home/ga/Videos/corporate_broll.mp4 in a continuous loop in fullscreen mode with no UI elements. The video must overlay /home/ga/Pictures/corp_logo.png in the top-left corner and a yellow (Hex 0xFFFF00) scrolling marquee at the bottom containing the text from /home/ga/Documents/ticker_text.txt. Provide a screenshot of the active signage saved to /home/ga/Documents/signage_proof.png.
